title: Thrite's Desert Survival Modpack
description: Thrite's Desert Survival Modpack, from his series "Surviving Minecraft's Hottest Mod"
body:
## General :
Thrite's Desert Survival Modpack, from [his series "Surviving Minecraft's Hottest Mod"](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C3Z9OP01J_o&list=PLJzM3Ob6JCeTbeaaYGTJqjmaBxUnGJQS-). <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/C3Z9OP01J_o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This modpack doesn't have exactly the same mods that Thrite gave in his description, but it does the same thing.

In this modpack, there are some new things :
- Water physics
- Cold and Heat
- You burn in the sun

You will have to cool yourself, stay in the shade and..... Survive !

#### **You need to create a sand world. To do so, go in "Create new world" > "More world options" > "World type" = single biome > desert.**
**You need to install optifine if you want to use shaders. I can't put it in the modpack because there is a copyright thing.**

You can [host this modpack on a BisectHosting server. Starts at 2.99$.](https://www.bisecthosting.com/clients/aff.php?aff=6703)

## Extra/Config



To change the [Cold Sweat](https://modrinth.com/mod/cold-sweat) setting, go in settings > "Options" > " [CL] logo near "resource packs". 


**If you have a bug, [join the discord](https://discord.gg/Fxq7EmvUh3), accept the rules and go to Help, then send a message with your problem and ping @amilex**



.

.

.

.

.





### Message to Thrite (if you ever get on this page): 
Hey, I wanted to ask you before publishing the modpack but i couldn't find a way to contact you (I asked in your comments but never got an awnser), if there is anything you want me to change or delete, i will do it.
